title: wedelia equatorialis
intro: Wedelia equatorialis, also known as Wedelia or Mexican daisy, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Its health benefits include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions.
